name: LangGraph
tagline: Stateful orchestration for long-running agents.
description: Graph-based control flow for branching, persistence, interrupts, and human-in-the-loop steps.

name: OpenAI Agents SDK
tagline: Compact primitives for agents, tools, and handoffs.
description: A production-oriented SDK for building tool-using agents with tracing, guardrails, and orchestration.

name: AutoGen
tagline: Multi-agent conversations and collaboration.
description: Framework for composing agents, tools, and message-driven workflows across multiple participants.

name: CrewAI
tagline: Role-based crews and task delegation.
description: Opinionated orchestration for agents organized by roles, tasks, and controlled process flows.

name: Semantic Kernel
tagline: Enterprise-friendly agent orchestration from Microsoft.
description: SDK for composing prompts, functions, memories, and planning across Python, .NET, and Java.

name: LlamaIndex
tagline: Data-aware agents and retrieval pipelines.
description: Toolkit for retrieval, query engines, agent workflows, and structured knowledge access.

name: PydanticAI
tagline: Typed agent building with Pydantic ergonomics.
description: Compact Python framework for structured outputs, tool use, and reliable agent state handling.

name: Agno
tagline: A fast framework for building agent teams.
description: Python-first platform for agentic workflows, tool use, structured outputs, and memory-aware systems.

name: OpenHands
tagline: Generalist software agents with sandboxed execution.
description: Open platform for coding agents, browser work, and multi-agent collaboration with safe execution.

name: E2B
tagline: Cloud sandboxes for code-executing agents.
description: Secure, programmable sandboxes for Python, Node, shell, notebooks, and long-lived sessions.

name: Daytona
tagline: Dev environments for agentic workflows.
description: Secure, ephemeral dev environments for running code, tests, and agent-driven workflows.

name: Modal Sandboxes
tagline: Ephemeral remote sandboxes on Modal.
description: Runs untrusted or dynamic code in isolated Modal environments for agent-adjacent workloads.

name: Browserbase
tagline: Hosted browser infrastructure for agents.
description: Managed browser sessions, proxies, and production-grade browser automation for web agents.

name: Browserless
tagline: Headless browser infrastructure at scale.
description: Browser automation platform for scraping, QA, and agent workflows that need a real browser.

name: Playwright
tagline: Reliable browser automation library.
description: Cross-browser automation for web agents, QA, and tool-driven browsing tasks.

name: Skyvern
tagline: Browser tasks with AI-driven execution.
description: Browser automation system for completing web tasks and structured online workflows.

name: Stagehand
tagline: Browser control with natural-language helpers.
description: Browserbase project that mixes deterministic Playwright-style control with LLM-assisted actions.

name: browser-use
tagline: Open-source browser agent framework.
description: Python project for browser automation tasks with LLM guidance, page understanding, and actions.

name: Letta
tagline: Stateful agents with long-term memory.
description: Memory-centric agent platform focused on persistent context, state, and agent self-management.

name: Mem0
tagline: Universal memory layer for agents.
description: Stores and retrieves personalized context across sessions so agents can remember what matters.

name: Zep
tagline: Memory infrastructure for agent applications.
description: Context and conversation memory service for long-running assistants and customer-facing agents.

name: Supermemory
tagline: Personal and app memory for AI products.
description: Memory layer for retaining facts, context, and user-specific information across interactions.

name: Pinecone
tagline: Vector database widely used for agent memory.
description: Managed vector infrastructure for retrieval, memory, semantic search, and embedded context stores.

name: Qdrant
tagline: Open-source vector database for memory and retrieval.
description: Self-hostable vector engine for agent memory, search, and context retrieval pipelines.

name: Lakera
tagline: Prompt-injection and AI security defenses.
description: Security layer for protecting agents from prompt injection, unsafe inputs, and malicious content.

name: Guardrails AI
tagline: Validation, railings, and output constraints.
description: Open-source and commercial tooling for constraining model output and checking structured responses.

name: Promptfoo
tagline: Eval and red-teaming for prompt and agent safety.
description: Test harness for prompt regression, safety checks, model comparisons, and adversarial evals.

name: Giskard
tagline: LLM testing and red-teaming platform.
description: Open-source testing suite for model behavior, risk checks, and safety validation in AI systems.

name: Model Context Protocol
tagline: Standard protocol for tools and context.
description: Defines how clients connect to tools, prompts, and resources across agent applications.

name: Smithery
tagline: Discovery and hosting for MCP servers.
description: Catalog and deployment surface for MCP servers used by agent clients and developer tools.

name: Composio
tagline: Managed app integrations and actions for agents.
description: Connects agents to SaaS tools with auth, action schemas, and managed execution.

name: Nango
tagline: OAuth and API integrations for agent workflows.
description: Handles OAuth, token refresh, and unified integration plumbing for external APIs.

name: Pipedream
tagline: Connect APIs and run event-driven workflows.
description: Developer platform for triggers, API workflows, and integration logic that agents can call into.

name: Inngest
tagline: Durable functions and workflows.
description: Event-driven workflow infrastructure for durable background jobs, retries, and agent steps.

name: Trigger.dev
tagline: Background jobs for AI and web apps.
description: Open-source job platform for long-running tasks, retries, schedules, and API workflows.

name: LiteLLM
tagline: OpenAI-compatible gateway across model providers.
description: Proxy and SDK for routing, budgets, fallbacks, logging, and provider abstraction.

name: OpenRouter
tagline: Unified API for many model providers.
description: Routes requests across a large model catalog with a common API surface and provider marketplace.

name: Vercel AI Gateway
tagline: Managed gateway for model routing and observability.
description: Vercel-hosted gateway for calling models with routing, reliability, and usage visibility.

name: Portkey
tagline: AI gateway with guardrails and policy controls.
description: Gateway layer for routing, governance, safeguards, and observability across model providers.

name: LangSmith
tagline: Tracing, evals, and debugging for LLM apps.
description: Observability suite for inspecting runs, prompts, datasets, and agent decision chains.

name: Langfuse
tagline: Open-source LLM observability and analytics.
description: Track traces, prompts, metrics, evals, and cost data for production AI systems.

name: Arize Phoenix
tagline: Open-source tracing and evaluation.
description: Agent and model observability with spans, retrieval evaluation, and experiment analysis.

name: Helicone
tagline: LLM request logging and cost analytics.
description: Gateway-style observability for prompts, latency, spend, caching, and usage patterns.

name: Braintrust
tagline: Eval platform for model and agent quality.
description: Testing, tracing, evals, datasets, and feedback loops for AI products and agents.

name: Modal
tagline: Serverless compute for AI jobs and services.
description: Elastic Python infrastructure for containers, GPUs, scheduled jobs, queues, and agent backends.

name: Fly.io
tagline: Global app deployment close to users.
description: Developer-friendly platform for deploying persistent services and workers in multiple regions.

name: Baseten
tagline: Model serving and AI deployment infrastructure.
description: Deploys custom models and inference services with autoscaling, observability, and GPU capacity.

name: Replicate
tagline: Run models and AI workflows via API.
description: Hosted model execution and prediction infrastructure for apps that need reliable inference endpoints.

name: RunPod
tagline: GPU cloud for model and agent workloads.
description: Affordable GPU compute for training, inference, and long-running workloads around agents.

name: BentoML
tagline: Model serving and inference deployment tooling.
description: Open-source and managed tooling for packaging, serving, and scaling model-backed applications.
